The current visit record indicates that the patient has been diagnosed with "Pure hypercholesterolemia." This diagnosis is a specific lipid disorder that falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this condition is explicitly documented in the patient's current visit, it is reasonable to predict that this diagnosis will be coded again in the patient's next hospital visit, especially if there is ongoing management or monitoring of this condition.
